02 · Projects

Featured Work

Reservoir Computing — NGRC
Active
Basic Reconstruction in Piecewise Smooth Nonlinear Maps

Developed a Next Generation Reservoir Computing (NGRC) framework for state reconstruction and nonlinear dynamical system modelling. Nonlinear feature expansion with delay-coordinate embedding.

NGRCReservoir Computing Nonlinear DynamicsPython
Magnetospheric Region Identification
Stable
Supervised ML for Space Physics

Built an automated classification pipeline for identifying magnetospheric plasma regions from spacecraft observations. Models: T24 Classifier, GMM, DBSCAN, CNN–Random Forest Hybrid.

Space PhysicsGMM DBSCANCNNRandom Forest
Stellar Spectral Classification (SDSS)
Stable
Astronomical Data Analysis

Collected, cleaned, and analysed SDSS spectra for 20+ stars, presented findings to a faculty evaluation panel. Spectral preprocessing, feature engineering, statistical analysis, astronomical data visualisation.

SDSSSpectral Analysis Feature EngineeringAstronomy
AI-Powered GIS · PM-AJAY Scheme
Stable
Geospatial Decision Intelligence

Designed a centralised AI-driven GIS platform to integrate and visualise multi-agency programme data for policy monitoring and decision support. Interactive dashboards + spatial data integration.

GISAI Spatial AnalyticsDashboards
Credit Card Fraud Detection
Stable
Graph-Based Fraud Analytics

End-to-end fraud detection pipeline on the IEEE-CIS dataset. Benchmarked classical ML against graph neural networks on highly imbalanced transaction data using SMOTE and Focal Loss.

XGBoostHGNN-ATT-TD SMOTEGraph NNIEEE-CIS
ClimateTwin AI
Active
Agentic Urban Climate Intelligence System

Intelligent climate forecasting platform combining fast nonlinear prediction with autonomous AI reasoning for explainable urban climate decision support. Reservoir Computing + Agentic AI + XAI pipeline.

Reservoir ComputingAgentic AI XAIClimate
Recommendation Graph Dynamics
Active
Attraction & Retention in Recommendation Graphs

Investigated structural patterns governing user attraction and long-term retention across recommendation graphs using network science and graph analytics. Cross-dataset analysis.

Graph AnalyticsNetwork Science Recommendation SystemsPython
AudioGuard
Stable
Classical ML for Environmental Audio Classification

Modular audio intelligence pipeline for speech, music, and environmental sound classification using handcrafted acoustic features. MFCC-based feature engineering with Gradient Boosting, SVM (RBF), and KNN.

MFCCGradient Boosting SVMKNNAudio ML
